island_endpoint_authz.description: Nuxt 3 island endpoint authz bypass (CVE-2026-47200/46342 class) — /__nuxt_island/<Component>/<hash> server-renders an island component reachable without the auth middleware that protects the parent page. Tests known island URLs without session.

probes.description: GET /__nuxt_island/<Component>/<hash> without auth — if 200 with rendered HTML, island authz bypass confirmed
Island endpoint with sensitive payload — grep for user_id, email, role markers in island HTML

og_image_renderer_dos.description: Nuxt OG Image renderer DoS (CVE-2026-34404 class) — /__og-image__/ endpoint with large query string forces server-side rendering of expensive PNG generation. Detect via elapsed_ms spike OR 5xx.

probes.description: /__og-image__/ with long text param — OG renderer must rasterise; latency spike confirms DoS surface

server_routes_middleware_bypass.description: Nuxt /server/routes/ middleware bypass — middleware registered with route-prefix matcher can be bypassed via path-traversal (/api/protected/../public/<resource>) or trailing-slash mismatch. Tests common bypass shapes.
